responses: Hello! Welcome to the College Information Portal. How can I assist you today?

patterns: How do I apply for admission?
How to get admission in your college?
Tell me about the enrollment process
What documents are required for admission?
Is there a last date for applying?
Can I apply online for admission?
How to enroll in your college?
How to register for a course?
responses: Admissions are open from June 1st to July 31st every year. You can apply online at our portal or visit the admissions office. Required documents: 10th & 12th marksheets, ID proof, passport photo, and transfer certificate.

Our admission process: 1) Fill the online application form. 2) Upload required documents. 3) Pay the application fee (₹500). 4) Appear for counselling. 5) Confirm your seat. Admissions open annually in June.
To apply for admission, visit our website and fill the application form. The eligibility is 60% in 12th standard. Admissions are merit-based with counselling sessions held in July.
You can apply for admission online at college.edu/admissions. The last date is July 31st. Required documents include academic transcripts, ID proof, and a recent photograph.

patterns: How much is the tuition fee?
How much does it cost to study here?
Can I pay fees in installments?
responses: Our fee structure for the academic year 2024-25: B.Tech ₹80,000/year, BCA ₹45,000/year, BBA ₹40,000/year, MBA ₹1,20,000/year. Hostel: ₹60,000/year. Fees can be paid in two installments.
Tuition fees vary by program: Engineering ₹80,000/year, Computer Applications ₹45,000/year, Management ₹40,000/year. We offer merit scholarships up to 50% fee waiver for top-ranking students.
The annual fee for B.Tech is ₹80,000 and for MBA is ₹1,20,000. Scholarships are available for students scoring above 90% in 12th. Fee payment can be done online or at the accounts office.

We have flexible fee payment options including installments. Scholarships are available for economically weaker sections and meritorious students. Contact accounts@college.edu for detailed fee breakdowns.

patterns: Tell me about the programs available
responses:
We offer the following programs:
• B.Tech (CSE, ECE, ME, CE, EEE)
• BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications)
• BBA (Bachelor of Business Administration)
• MBA (Master of Business Administration)
• MCA (Master of Computer Applications)
• M.Tech (CSE, ECE)
All programs are AICTE approved.

Our college offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs in Engineering, Computer Science, and Management. Popular courses include B.Tech CSE, BCA, BBA, MBA, and MCA. We also offer certificate courses in Data Science and Cloud Computing.

Available courses: B.Tech (4 years), BCA (3 years), BBA (3 years), MBA (2 years), MCA (2 years), M.Tech (2 years). We also have short-term certification programs in AI/ML, Web Development, and Digital Marketing.
Courses offered include B.Tech in 5 specializations, BCA, BBA, MBA, MCA, and M.Tech. All courses are approved by AICTE and affiliated with the State Technical University.

patterns: When does the result come out?
responses: Exams are held at the end of each semester. Semester exams (December & May) are conducted by the university. Internal exams (unit tests) are held monthly. You need 75% attendance to appear for semester exams.

Exam schedule: Unit Test 1 (September), Mid-Semester (October), Unit Test 2 (November), Semester End (December). Results are declared within 30 days. Hall tickets are available on the student portal 2 weeks before exams.
The exam pattern includes: Internal Assessment (40 marks) + Semester End Exam (60 marks) = 100 marks. Minimum passing marks: 40%. Supplementary exams are held for students who fail.

Semester exams are conducted in November-December and April-May. Results are published on the university portal. You can download hall tickets from the student dashboard. Re-exams are available for failed subjects.

Our faculty includes 150+ highly qualified professors, 60% of whom hold PhD degrees. Key personnel: Principal – Dr. Ramesh Kumar (PhD, IIT Delhi), HOD CSE – Dr. Priya Sharma (PhD, NIT), HOD MBA – Prof. Anil Mehta (MBA, IIM). Faculty contact details are on our website.

We have an experienced faculty team with expertise in AI/ML, Data Science, Networks, and Management. Many faculty members are industry consultants and published researchers. Faculty office hours are 10 AM – 4 PM on weekdays.

The college has 150+ faculty across departments. CSE department is led by Dr. Priya Sharma. Faculty members have experience from top institutions like IITs, NITs, and IIMs. You can find faculty profiles at college.edu/faculty.

Our teaching staff includes 80 permanent faculty and 30 visiting industry experts. Faculty members have average 12+ years of experience. Several professors are active researchers with 200+ publications collectively.

Upcoming Events:
• TechFest 2024 – October 15-17 (Hackathon, Coding Contest, Robotics)
• Annual Cultural Fest – November 20-22 (Music, Dance, Drama)
• Placement Drive – December 1-15 (Top 50+ companies)
• Sports Week – January 10-15
Visit college.edu/events for registration.

We host regular events including TechFest (annual technical festival), CultFest (cultural festival), industry seminars, hackathons, and placement drives. The next major event is TechFest in October. Register on our student portal.

College events this semester: Hackathon (Oct 20), Industry Expert Talk (Oct 28), Annual Sports Meet (Nov 5), Cultural Fest (Nov 20-22), Campus Placement Drive (Dec 1-15). All events are free for enrolled students.

Upcoming events include technical workshops on AI/ML and Cloud Computing, cultural performances during CultFest, and the annual placement drive with 50+ recruiting companies. Check the notice board or college.edu/events for updates.

patterns: What is the average salary package?
responses: Our placement record 2023-24: 95% placement rate, Avg package ₹6.5 LPA, Highest package ₹28 LPA (Google). Top recruiters: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, Accenture, Amazon, Flipkart, Deloitte, IBM, and 40+ more companies.

Excellent placement record! Last year, 95% of eligible students were placed. Average package: ₹6.5 LPA. Highest: ₹28 LPA. Top companies: Amazon, Google, Microsoft, TCS, Infosys. Placement cell provides training, mock interviews, and resume building.

The college placement cell is very active with 50+ companies visiting each year. Average salary is ₹6.5 LPA with the highest reaching ₹28 LPA. We also support internships and off-campus placements through our alumni network of 10,000+ professionals.

Placements at our college are excellent. 2023 statistics: 850 students placed, 50+ companies, avg package ₹6.5 LPA, max package ₹28 LPA. Companies include top MNCs like Amazon, Google, and IBM, plus domestic leaders like TCS and Infosys.

We have separate hostels for boys and girls with 24/7 security. Hostel fee: ₹60,000/year (including mess). Facilities: Wi-Fi, AC rooms (premium), gym, common room with TV, laundry service. Apply for hostel during admission.

Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. Amenities include: furnished rooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, 24-hour hot water, nutritious mess food (veg/non-veg), security, and recreational facilities. Hostel fee is ₹60,000/year inclusive of meals.

On-campus hostels are available with excellent facilities. Boys hostel capacity: 500 students. Girls hostel capacity: 300 students. Amenities include Wi-Fi, AC rooms, gym, mess, and 24/7 security. Hostel allocation is first-come, first-served.

Campus accommodation includes boys and girls hostels with all modern amenities. The hostel fee of ₹60,000/year covers accommodation and three meals daily. Hostel residents get priority access to library and sports facilities.

The college library is open 8 AM – 8 PM on weekdays and 9 AM – 5 PM on weekends. It has 50,000+ books, 200+ journals, and access to digital databases like IEEE, Springer, and JSTOR. Students can borrow up to 3 books for 14 days.

Our well-equipped library has 50,000+ physical books and access to major digital libraries. Features: separate reading rooms, digital catalog, e-journals, 24/7 online access to digital resources. Library cards are issued during admission.

The library offers 50,000+ books across all subjects, digital resources (IEEE, ACM, Springer), comfortable reading rooms, and Wi-Fi. Timing: Mon-Fri 8 AM – 8 PM, Sat-Sun 9 AM – 5 PM. Maximum borrow: 3 books for 14 days.
